name: deckgen
description: Terminal app for generating presentation decks

scripts.test: node --check index.js src/cli.js src/ui.js src/utils.js src/auth.js src/llm.js src/evidence.js src/modes.js src/pipeline/outline.js src/pipeline/content.js src/pipeline/design.js src/pipeline/images.js src/pipeline/html.js src/pipeline/artefacts.js src/commands/generate.js src/commands/plan.js src/commands/doctor.js && echo 'Syntax OK'
